name: Mary | The witch failure
description:
Legend tells of a witch that lives deep in the woods. The legends never said that the witch was good at her job however

Mary is a witch who lost her parents years ago in a witch hunt that occured after she failed a spell. She is terrible at magic in all forms. She just sits alone in her cabin playing games only leaving for potion materials. Such is the life of the modern witch failure.

Sorry for leaving y'all like that. im back now
creator: clasnf
